_comment: Reference Library calibration data. Columns A-P from data/Supporting Data.xlsx + PO Last price. Use po_actual_price only for accuracy scoring — never as pipeline input.

304SS sheet 0.19, 22.5 long, 90deg bends typical, 45deg cuts 2x, R.5 typ. Holes: 2x O0.266 + 2x O0.391 = 4 thru. STST no finish, POA (paint one side). Drawing date 9/12/2024.

304 SS weldment DOOR FRAME 75.5x26.95 envelope. Sub-parts (5 distinct, 15 pieces total): P196206 STANDOFF x8, P196209 HINGE BAR x2, P196212 CAP SLUG x2, P196213 DOOR ANGLE TUBE x2, P284879 DOOR TUBE x1. NO finish, grind flush, MIG/TIG, dims after welding.

1018 CRS 0.50 thk, 10.50x13.75in plate. 6x A=Ø.266 THRU, 4x .391 oblong slots. R1.5 relief, R.13 TYP corners. Paint machine color. Drawn 3/1/2016. Qty per section: 1.

304 STST weldment. 7 sub-part types, 15 total pieces: P196206 STANDOFF x7, P196209 HINGE BAR x2, P196212 CAP SLUG x2, P196213 DOOR ANGLE TUBE x2, P196214 DOOR TUBE x1, P216596 DOOR TUBE x1, P216597 DOOR TUBE x1. All welds free of porosity/cold lap/undercut. Dims after welding. Grind flush TYP. Flatness 0.063. 64.00 after welding. Drawn 03/24/2020 Rev A (03/25/2025 added flatness/grind notes).

A36PLT 0.12 thk. 5.75 x 6.00 unfolded, 4.75 x 6.00 after Rev A width reduction. 1x A=Ø.266 THRU. 45° bend + formed slot tab (R.25 TYP). Paint machine color. Use model geometry. Rev A 04/06/2022: reduced overall width. Drawn 06/14/2021. Category: MANUFACTURED.

1018 CRS 0.38 thk, 8.75x83.50 in plate. 31x A=Ø.391 THRU, 2x B=Ø.516 THRU, 1x C=Ø1.500 THRU, 7x D=8-32 UNC tapped, 4x E=10-32 UNF tapped, 2x F=3/8-16 UNC, 2x G=G1/2-14 (pipe tapped). R.13 4x corners, R.25 4x. 11° angled section. 47 total hole features. Paint machine color. Sister to P250708 (60in ver). Rev A 12/28/2023: 2 holes added for new motor mount. Drawn 02/11/2016.

1018 CRS 0.38 thk, 2.70 x 71.50 in long rail. 1x A=Ø.386 THRU. R.13 3X + R.13 8X corner reliefs. Multiple length stations (.000, 1.43, 9.63, 10.50, 28.00, 33.75, 39.75, 45.50, 63.00, 63.88, 70.07, 71.50). Paint machine color. Rev A 09/23/2019: updated to proper hole dimensions. Drawn 02/11/2016. Sister to P107961.

1018 CRS 0.25 thk, 3.00 x 81.38 in plate. 2x A=Ø1.125 THRU, 4x B=8-32 UNC tapped, 4x C=10-32 UNF tapped, 5x D=Ø.391 THRU w/ Ø.781 x 82° c'sink. R.75 2X, R.5 4X, R.25 4X. Paint machine color. Rev A 05/11/2016: added holes for P/E location.

1018 CRS weldment. Main tube .13x2.00x3.00x38.00 + 2x sub-tubes .13x2.00x3.00x6.22 + 2x S-24 + 2x S-20 standoffs. 4x B=Ø.391 THRU, 6x A=1/4-20 UNC x .125. R.13 4X. All welds free of porosity/cold lap/undercut. All dims after welding. Paint machine color.
ALUM 6061 0.25 thk, 4.00 x 30.00 in. 2x Ø.391 THRU w/ Ø.781 x 82° c'sink this side. R.25 4X. 20° 2X angled corners. No finish noted (bare aluminum).
1018 CRS 0.12 thk small PE bracket. 1x Ø.750 THRU, 1x Ø1.160 reference cutout, 2x .180 SLOT. Two bends: 15° TYP and 30° TYP. R1.00, R3.75. Paint machine color.

304 STST 0.12 thk, 12.13 x 17.00 in unfolded. 8x A=Ø.203 THRU w/ Ø.406 x 82° c'sink. 90° 3X bends. R.25 TYP. 15° 2X, .75 2X. Sheet metal tolerances per SPECO DWG SK1058B. Use removable labels w/ part+job #. Rev B 11/30/2016: changed dim from 8.00, removed material.

1018 CRS weldment. Sub-parts: P118804 WRAP ROD x4, P159971 WRAP PLATE WATERJET x1. NO GRIND 4X. 45° 4X corners. All welds free of porosity/cold lap/undercut. All dims after welding. Paint machine color. Rev A 10/17/2019: made subparts as waterjet part. Rev B 05/25/2022: removed unnecessary weld notes. Drawn 09/20/2016.

ALUM 6061 0.25 thk, 2.00 x 3.50 in small plate. 2x A=Ø.406 THRU, 1x B=Ø1.25 THRU. Black anodize finish. Drawn 06/26/2014. Rev A 06/12/2017: fixed tolerance on hole.
1018 CRS 0.38 thk, 5.24 x 59.50 in chain rail 60" version (shorter sister to P107961 84"). 4x A=Ø.201 THRU, 8x B=Ø.391 THRU. R.13 TYP, R3.38 corner, 25°/45° TYP, 60° angle. Paint machine color.

UHMW round, OD Ø1.000, length 3.94 in. 1x thru bore Ø.516 (+.015/-0). Turned/machined nose roller. Drawn 08/10/2017.

1018 CRS 0.19 thk lay sheet guard, 3.25 x 41.50 in. 4x A=Ø.391 THRU. 60° bend. R1 2X, R.25 2X. Paint safety yellow. Sheet metal.

Generic enclosure modification on Hoffman SCE-36EL3608LP, 36 x 8 in panel. 4x A=Ø.391 THRU, 1x B=Ø1.984, 4x C=Ø.266, 12x D=Ø.875, 5x E=Ø.391, 24x Ø.500 x .075 (slot/dimple). Drawn 06/17/2020 Rev B (02/28/2025 added 1 Ø.391; 01/03/2025 removed 28 Ø.500 + 13 Ø.875).

Steel weldment robot riser 60" tall for M410 140H robot. Sub-parts: P126055 BASE PLATE x1, P126979 TOP PLATE x1, P198757 TUBE x1, P198786 TUBE GUSSET x4. 6-step weld sequence (tack 1-2, 3-4, 1-4, 2-3 to minimize warp). FEA required when robot mounting surface moves >.0625" under normal ops. All welds free of porosity/cold lap/undercut. Flatness 0.060. All dims after welding. Sister to P198624 (48" ver). Drawn EBK.

1018 CRS 0.25 thk F18 reducer adapter, 6 x 6 in. 8x Ø.266 THRU on Ø3.500 bolt circle (located as shown, 45° spacing), 1x A=Ø.266 THRU, 1x B=Ø2.50 THRU center. R.25 TYP, .328 4X. Paint machine color. Sheet metal tolerances per SPECO DWG SK1058B.

1018 CRS weldment robot riser 48" tall for M410 140H robot. Sub-parts: P126055 BASE PLATE x1, P126979 TOP PLATE x1, P198655 TUBE x1, P198685 TUBE GUSSET x4. 6-step weld sequence to minimize warp. FEA required when >.0625" movement at robot mounting surface. Flatness 0.060. All welds free of porosity/cold lap/undercut. All dims after welding. Sister to P198715 (60" ver). Drawn 03/29/2017 Rev A (04/29/2026 fixed top plate from P303855).

1018 CRS 0.19 thk bottom sheet metal panel, ~48 x 46 in (~2208 sq in - very large, similar scale to P289204 LIFT POW). 30x A=Ø.266 THRU (main hole grid), 4x B=Ø.266 THRU, 4x C=Ø.266 THRU (38 holes total). R1 TYP, 48.00 4X. Drawn 01/12/2026 Rev A 02/16/2026 added cut list. All welds free of porosity/cold lap/undercut (some welding noted).

1018 CRS 0.25 thk side shield, 6.00 x 38.00 in. 3x A=Ø.391 THRU w/ Ø.798 x 82° c'sink. R.25 TYP. 10° 2X angles, 6.00 2X. 90° bends typical (2 bends). Paint safety yellow. Drawn 05/02/2025. Middle sister to P301137 (56") and P303455 (12") same .25 CRS family.
1018 CRS 0.19 thk pallet guide, 4.75 x 39.00 in. 3x A=Ø.266 THRU w/ Ø.548 x 82° c'sink. R.25 TYP. 10° angle. 90° bend (1 bend). Paint safety yellow. Drawn 02/19/2026.

parts.finish: Paint (machine color, NO PAINT shaded area)
parts.notes: 304 STST 0.12 thk conveyor pan drive side, 21.00 x 47.50 in (~997 sq in). 32x A=Ø.266 THRU + 2x F=Ø.266 THRU = 34 main thru, 2x B=Ø.266 x .120 c'sink, 4x C=1/4-20 UNC tapped, 5x D=Ø.266 x .120 c'sink, 8x E=Ø.391 x .120 c'sink, 12x .266 standalone, 1x Ø.118 BC ref. DO NOT PAINT SHADED AREA THIS SIDE. Sister to P306155 (longer 71.5" ver). Drawn 01/27/2020.
1018 CRS 0.12 thk conveyor bracket, 2.13 x 9.75 in. 2x Ø.391 THRU, .328 2X c'sink. R.16 4X, R.25 TYP, R.06 2X. 90° bend (1 bend). Drawn 04/21/2026. Sister/twin to P308506 (shorter 9.75 vs 9.75).
304 STST 0.25 thk cross support guide rail, 2.50 x 19.88 in. 2x .328 + 2x .391 (4 holes). R.5 4X. 90° bend (1 bend). STST no finish. Drawn 04/21/2026.
1018 CRS 0.12 thk conveyor bracket, 2.13 x 9.75 in. 2x Ø.391 THRU, .328 2X c'sink. R.16 4X, R.25 TYP, R.06 2X. 90° bend (1 bend). Drawn 04/21/2026. Twin to P308578.

parts.finish: Paint (machine color, NO PAINT shaded area)
parts.notes: 304 STST 0.12 thk conveyor pan drive side, 21.00 x 71.50 in (~1502 sq in, longer sister to P306151 47.5" ver). 32x A=Ø.266 THRU + 2x F=Ø.266 THRU = 34 main thru, 2x B=Ø.266 x .120 c'sink, 8x C=1/4-20 UNC tapped, 6x D=Ø.266 x .120 c'sink, 10x E=Ø.391 x .120 c'sink, 12x .266 standalone, 1x Ø.118 BC ref. DO NOT PAINT SHADED AREA THIS SIDE. Drawn 01/27/2020.

parts.dims: 1.00 thk x ~13.88 x 20.75 in (large hook profile)
parts.notes: 1018 CRS 1.00 thk pallet lift hook, ~13.88 x 20.75 in hook profile. 1x Ø.328 THRU, 1x Ø1.250 ±.001 hole (precision). Complex contour: R15, R17, R3, R2, R4, R.5 8X, R1.5 5X, R2. 45° chamfer. POW finish. Drawn EBK. Rev A 03/13/2016: shortened end 1.00". Notable: thickest plate in library (1.00"), complex multi-radius profile.

ALUM 5052 0.12 thk fence mount for wire basket, 2.00 x 9.00 in. 2x A=Ø.391 THRU (was Ø.328 pre-Rev A), .266 ref hole. R.5 2X, R.5 3X, R.13 4X. 41° + 45° angles, 90° bends (2 bends). No finish (bare aluminum). Drawn 03/25/2019 Rev A 08/08/2022: changed hole from Ø.328 to Ø.391. First 5052 ALUM entry (most parts are 6061).

1018 CRS 0.50 thk hard stop plate, 5.00 x 23.50 in. 3x A=Ø.516 thru, 2x B=Ø.391 thru (5 thru holes). R.5 TYP. No bends. Paint machine color. Drawn EBK. Rev A 01/19/2018: added (2) .391 holes. Thicker plate (0.50).

1018 CRS 0.173 thk (~3/16) wireway floor mount, 2.00 x 10.00 in formed. 1x A=Ø.266 x .173 (1 c'sink/blind), 2x B=Ø.500 thru (enlarged for 3/8 lag bolt grommet from 25/64, Rev B 06/14/2022). R.25 TYP. 21° angle, 2 bends (90°). Paint RAL 7036. Drawn 12/11/2016 Rev C 12/30/2022 no change. Rev A 09/19/2019: added radius and missing dim. Sheet metal tolerances per SPECO SK1058B.

1018 CRS 0.25 thk LONG infeed guide, 5.00 x 88.30 in (~442 sq in, longest part in library). 3x A=Ø1.125 THRU, 6x B=8-32 UNC tapped Z.250, 5x C=10-32 UNF tapped Z.250, 6x D=Ø.391 thru x Ø.781 x 82° c'sink this side. R.5 4X. 15° and 20° + 10° angles. Flattened pattern shown (~6.472 wide flat). 1 bend. Paint machine color. Drawn WMS. Heavily-featured long part: 9 thru + 11 tapped + 6 c'sink = 26 features.

1018 HRS angle drive plate mount, 3/16 x 3 x 2 angle x 10 in. 3x Ø.266 thru + 12x Ø.391 thru = 15 thru holes total. NO bends (angle stock — preformed structural shape). Paint machine color. Drawn EDS. First angle-stock part in library.

Galvanized steel 0.06 thk arc barrier (TEP10UL12-ARC-BARRIER-10"), 1.00 x 13.00 in. 4x A=Ø.172 thru. 45° chamfers 2X. No bends. Galvanized (no paint). Drawn JB 7/28/2009. First galvanized part in library. Sheet metal tolerances per SPECO SK1058B.

1018 CRS 0.25 thk drive side plates, 8.50 x 16.00 in formed. Hole table 5 types: 1x A=Ø.266 thru, 6x B=Ø.391 thru, 2x C=Ø.453 thru, 1x D=Ø.500 thru, 1x E=Ø2.25 thru (LARGE bore!) = 11 thru holes total. R.5 TYP. 80° bend 2X, 1 bend. Paint machine color. Drawn EBK. Material code stamped 1018SHT0.25 in cutlist. Sheet metal tolerances per SPECO SK1058B. Note: Use model geometry, 90° bends typical. Heavy-feature plate.
Aluminum 0.13 thk Murr block guard, 5.00 x 9.00 in. 2x Ø.266 thru. R1 2X, R.13 2X. No bends. No finish. Drawn MS 2/24/2017. Small aluminum guard part.

parts.dims: ~64.00 tall x 2.50 wide door frame weldment
parts.notes: 304 STST WELDMENT door frame, ~64.00 tall x 2.50 wide. 8 sub-part types: STANDOFF x2, HINGE BAR x2, DOOR TUBE (multiple) x2+x2+x7, CAP SLUG x4, DOOR ANGLE TUBE. Total 19 sub-parts. 304 STST no finish. Drawn KJB. Existing part in CostCalc (sole-source Osage Piping $675). All-stainless heavy door frame weldment.

parts.dims: ~64.50 tall x 2.50 wide door frame weldment
parts.notes: 304 STST WELDMENT door frame, ~64.50 tall x 2.50 wide. Sub-parts: P196206 STANDOFF x7, P196209 HINGE BAR x2, P196212 CAP SLUG x2, P196213 DOOR ANGLE TUBE x2, P196214 DOOR TUBE x1, P216555 DOOR TUBE x1, P216556 DOOR TUBE x1 = 16 sub-parts. Grind flush typ. .063 flatness callouts. 304 STST no finish. Drawn KJB 03/24/2020 Rev A 03/25/2025: added flatness & grind notes, missing dims. Sister to P196207 (same designer KJB), longer 64.5 vs 64.0. All-stainless heavy door frame variant.

1019 angle stock door mount, 3.00 x 3.00 ANGLE x 3.00 in. 4x A=Ø.266 thru. POW (powder coat) finish. No bends (angle stock preformed). Material code stamped 1019ANG48X48X4. Drawn MLK 10/12/2022. Small structural angle door mount. Sister concept to P193649 (different angle size).

304 STST angle stock tray peel finger, 1/8 x 2 x 2 angle x 3 1/8 in. 4x A=Ø.217 thru. R.13 2X. No bends (angle stock). Material code 304ANG. No finish (STST). Drawn CC 11/9/2016. First 304 STST angle part in library. Small tray-handling part.

1018 CRS 0.25 thk fence adapter for light curtain, 2.00 x 2.25 in formed (small). 1x A=Ø.391 thru, 1x B=M8x1.25 tapped (METRIC tap — unusual). R.25 4X. 1 bend (1.63 flange, 90° typical). Material code 1018SHT0.25. Paint safety yellow. Drawn SEC 03/04/2020. First METRIC tapped hole in library. Light curtain mounting hardware.

1018 CRS 0.19 thk (3/16) mute-in mount bracket for light curtain, 1.88 x 11.75 in formed. Hole table 3 types: 2x A=Ø.203 thru, 2x B=Ø.750 thru, 2x C=Ø.391 thru = 6 thru holes. R1.5, R.25 4X, R.06 2X. 1 bend (3.75/0.75 flange). Material code 1018SHT0.19. Paint safety yellow. Drawn SEC 03/04/2020. Light curtain accessory — sister to P238017 fence adapter. Existing part in CostCalc (BOSS $19 best, has 4 vendors).

1018 CRS 0.38 thk LONG side frame 84", 8.75 x 83.50 in. Hole table 7 types: 26x A=Ø.391 thru, 2x B=Ø.516 thru, 1x C=Ø1.500 thru (LARGE), 6x D=8-32 UNC tapped, 4x E=10-32 UNF tapped, 3x F=3/8-16 UNC tapped, 1x G=G1/2-14 tapped pipe thread = 29 thru + 14 tapped (43 total features). R.13 4X, R.25 4X. Paint machine color. Drawn MLK 11/28/2022. LARGEST area part in library to date at 731 sqin (beats P200140 at 576). Heaviest tapped-hole count: 14. First G1/2-14 pipe-thread tap. Tied for heaviest hole count overall with P200140 (41 holes).

1018 CRS 0.12 thk chain guard, 13.56 x 34.69 in. 6x A=Ø.265 thru. R.25 4X. NO bends (flat plate). Paint machine color. Drawn cc 02/26/2016. Large flat chain guard plate. Sheet metal tolerances per SPECO SK1058B.

parts.dims: 0.38 x 2.00 x 17.38 in seal plate w/ all-thread studs
parts.notes: 304 STST WELDMENT seal plates 2 & 6 PK. Sub-parts: 0.38 x 2.00 x 17.38 plate x1, 3/8-16 ALL THREAD-RH x 3.25 stud x2 (RH = right-hand thread). 8x A=Ø.203 thru + 2x B=Ø.203 thru = 10 thru holes. Tapped: 3/8-16 UNC-2A 2X + 3/8-16 UNC-2A-RH 2X = 4 tapped. R.13 TYP. GRIND 2X (0.03 dim). 30° angle. POA finish. Drawn HAL 04/14/2021. 3rd 304 STST weldment in library. Notes RH (right-hand) thread spec.

1018 CRS 0.173 thk LONG front plate, 9.63 x 60.75 in formed. 4x A=Ø.203 x .174 (blind/c'sink), 10x B=Ø.266 thru. 45° angle 2X. R.25 4X. 1 bend (3.13 flange). Material code 1018SHT0.17. Paint safety yellow. Drawn EDS 06/13/2018. Sister to P279675 (slightly different 56.75 long version). 585 sqin — ranks among largest in library.

1018 CRS 0.25 thk handle plate, 2.00 x 4.75 in (small). 4x A=Ø.266 thru. R.13 4X. No bends. Material code 1018FLT4X32. Paint safety yellow. Drawn SEC 06/13/2018. Small simple flat plate — minimal features.

1018 CRS 0.173 thk LONG front plate variant, 10.87 x 60.50 in formed. 4x A=Ø.203 x .174 (blind/c'sink), 3x B=Ø.266 thru. 45° angle 2X. R.25 4X. 1 bend (4.37 flange). Material code 1018SHT0.17. Paint safety yellow. Drawn SEC 06/13/2018. Sister to P283605 (same date, fewer thru holes 3 vs 10, slightly wider 10.87 vs 9.63). 658 sqin — among largest in library.

1018 CRS 0.17 thk LONG sheet guide, 9.97 x 63.38 in formed. 4x A=Ø.203 x .174 (blind/c'sink), 3x B=Ø.266 thru x Ø.531 x 82° c'sink (this side). R.25 4X. 5° angle, 1 bend. Material code 1018SHT0.17. Paint safety yellow. Drawn EDS 06/13/2018. Sister to P283661 (different hole spacing) — paired sheet guides. Same date as P283605/P279675/P279674 (EDS/SEC 06/13/2018 batch).

1018 CRS 0.19 thk pallet guide, 4.75 x 40.97 in formed. 3x A=Ø.266 thru x Ø.548 x 82° c'sink (this side). R.25 4X. 170° angle (essentially flat with slight bend). 1 bend (2.00 flange, 90° typical). Material code 1018SHT0.19. Paint safety yellow. Drawn MLK 08/22/2024.

304 STST 0.12 thk spatula floor, 15.44 x 47.00 in formed (large). 12x A=Ø.205 thru x Ø.428 x 82° c'sink (this side). R.5 4X. 10° angle, 1 bend (0.51 flange, 90° typical). Material code 304SHT0.12. No finish (STST). Drawn EDS 02/05/2025. 726 sqin — close to P250709 (731 — LARGEST). Heavy 304 c'sink pattern (12 c'sink).

parts.dims: 0.12 x 2.38 x 3.75 in (formed, w/ Ø2.00 large bore)
parts.notes: 304 STST 0.12 thk conduit socket mount (50LF — 50A liquid-tight fitting?), 2.38 x 3.75 in formed. 2x A=Ø.266 x .120 (blind dimple) + 1x Ø2.000 large bore. R.25 TYP. 45° + 14° angles, 1 bend. Material code 304SHT0.12. No finish (STST). Drawn RPM 04/09/2025. Small conduit mounting bracket for electrical socket. New designer (RPM).

1018 CRS 0.17 thk LONG sheet guide, 9.97 x 63.375 in formed. 4x A=Ø.203 x .174 (blind/c'sink), 3x B=Ø.266 thru x Ø.531 x 82° c'sink (this side). R.25 4X. 5° angle, 1 bend. Material code 1018SHT0.17. Paint safety yellow. Drawn EDS 06/13/2018. Sister to P283660 (different hole spacing 14.875/35.875/56.875 vs 6.500/27.500/48.500) — mirror/handed pair.

1018 CRS 0.25 thk OS Integration mount front mute, 21.00 x 19.00 in formed. 4x A=Ø.406 thru, 4x B=3/8-16 UNC tapped. R.25 TYP. 1 bend (0.25 flange). Material code 1018SHT0.25. Paint machine color. Drawn BJZ 08/15/2024 Rev A 11/06/2025: removed cut out. Mid-size structural mount for safety integration. New designer (BJZ).

1018 CRS rectangular tube, 0.13 wall x 2.00 x 3.00 x 37.33 in long. 2x A=Ø.281 thru pierced through tube wall. POW (powder coat) finish. No bends. Material code 1018STB32X48X2 (2x3 rect tube stock). Drawn BJZ 08/15/2024. Sister concept to P211550 (304 square tube). First 1018 CRS rectangular tube in library (P211550 was 304 square).

1018 CRS 0.12 thk OUTER rib for slip sheet EOAT, 3.41 x 39.37 in formed. Hole table: 6x A=Ø.266 thru + 21x B=Ø.750 thru = 27 thru. .281 slot 10X. R.06 22X, R.25 20X. Multiple bends: UP 90° R.13, UP 45° R.13 (x2), DOWN 90° R.13 (x2 + many) — complex multi-direction bend pattern = ~8 bends total. Sister to P302581 INNER rib (same designer BJZ 12/12/2025, paired EOAT rib assembly). Highest 1018 Ø.750 hole count: 21. Material code 1018SHT0.12. Paint machine color. 2-sheet PDF (flat pattern on sheet 2).

parts.dims: ~128.19 x 12.00 wide pallet guide frame (large weldment)
parts.notes: 1018 CRS WELDMENT pallet guide frame, ~128.19 long x 12.00 wide (10.7 ft). Sub-parts: P301134 MOUNTING PLATE x1, P301136 TUBE x1, P301138 TUBE x1, P301139 TUBE x1, P301143 TUBE x1 = 5 sub-parts. 2X GRIND FLUSH AFTER WELD typ. Paint safety yellow. Drawn SEC 11/04/2025 Rev A 04/16/2026: was paint machine color (changed to safety yellow). Long safety pallet guide weldment — longest weldment in library. Sister to P301340 (PALLET GUIDE FRAME, also CL, also long). NOTE: This is in CostCalc as P301340 — P301339 is the 'A' rev or sister.

1018 CRS 0.12 thk vacuum generator bracket, 1.13 x 4.25 in formed (small). 2x A=Ø.125 thru, 3x B=Ø.203 thru, 2x C=Ø.266 thru, 1x D=Ø.750 thru = 8 thru holes (hole table 4 types). R.13 8X. Multiple bends (4 ~ complex U-channel profile). Material code 1018SHT0.12. Paint machine color. Drawn BJZ 12/15/2025. Small dense-feature bracket. 2-sheet PDF.

1018 CRS 0.12 thk INNER rib for slip sheet EOAT, 3.04 x 19.58 in formed (shorter than outer rib). Hole table: 6x A=Ø.281 thru + 7x B=Ø.750 thru = 13 thru. .281 slot 4X + 4X = 8 slot total. R.25 4X+8X, R.06 4X. Multiple bends (DOWN 90° R.13 x 4) = ~4 bends. Material code 1018SHT0.12. Paint machine color. Drawn BJZ 12/12/2025. Sister to P302579 OUTER rib (same designer/date, paired EOAT rib assembly). 2-sheet PDF (flat pattern on sheet 2).

1018 CRS 0.12 thk side plate, 19.97 x 40.00 in formed (large). Ø.266 TYP (estimate 5 thru holes from spacing). 10° angle, 1 bend (2.00 flange, 90° typical). Material code 1018SHT0.12. Paint machine color. Drawn SEC 01/13/2026 Rev B 03/23/2026: added holes for stiffening bracket. Rev A 02/16/2026: added cut list. ~799 sqin large side plate.

parts.finish: Paint machine color (partial — DO NOT PAINT SHADED AREA)
parts.notes: 1018 CRS 0.12 thk LONG conv pan DRIVE side, 21.00 x 82.25 in formed (~7 ft). Hole table 6 types: A=40 Ø.266 thru, B=8 1/4-20 UNC tapped, C=1 Ø.266 thru, D=2 Ø.391 thru, E=4 Ø.266 x .120, F=8 Ø.391 x .120 = 43 thru + 8 tapped + 12 dimples (~63 features). .266 12X. R.25 TYP. 1 bend (0.38, 90° typical). DO NOT PAINT SHADED AREA, OPPOSITE SIDE OF VIEW SAME. Material code 1018SHT0.12. Drawn CNW 03/20/2026 Rev B 04/17/2026: updated one end for flush mount. Rev A 03/30/2026: updated entire drawing. 1727 sqin large 1018 conv pan. Existing in CostCalc.

UHMW (gray) round idler roller, Ø3.00 x 1.25 thick. Center bore: Ø.754 -0.000/+0.002 THRU (precision tolerance). 1.250 height. Material code UHOFRNDX48GY (UHMW round 4ft length gray) qty 0.11. Drawn MH 10/25/2011. Plastic idler roller — needs lathe to turn from UHMW stock. Material family: UHMW (existing in library via P191251 UHMW roller). New variant: Ø3 size.

Comp roller mount accumulator side, STST 0.12 thk, 7.00 x 57.50 formed w/ 2x 90° bends. HOLD 7.000 critical dim. Hole table 7 types (mirrored top/bottom): A=Ø.266 thru x2, B=Ø.516 thru x1, C=3/8-16 UNC tapped x22, D=Ø.391x.120 dimples x4, E=Ø.266 thru x2, F=Ø.516 thru x1, G=3/8-16 UNC tapped x22 = totals 6 thru + 44 tapped + 14 c'sink R.25 + 4 dimples. .516 42X major hole pattern at 1.000 spacing along 44.000 length. NOTE: ALL BENDS @ 90° UNLESS SPECIFIED, sheet metal tol per SPECO SK1058B. Removable labels per JJL. Drawn JJL 06/08/2015 Job 2563. NEW RECORD: 22 tapped holes per side (44 total) = highest tapped count in library, exceeds P306497's 10 tapped.

End cap, 1018 CRS flat, 0.13 thk x 1.94 x 2.94 (nominal 1/8 x 2 x 3). R.22 4X corner radius (rounded corners). No holes, no bends. Flat laser/shear-cut blank. Drawn EBK 03/28/2018. Twin to ENDCAP2X3SS (same geometry, 304 STST variant — only material differs). Among smallest parts in library at 5.7 sqin (rivals P305617 at 1.5 sqin).

End cap, 304 STST flat, 0.13 thk x 1.94 x 2.94 (nominal 1/8 x 2 x 3). R.22 4X corner radius. No holes, no bends. Flat blank. Drawn EBK 03/28/2018. Twin to ENDCAP2X3CRS (only material differs — 304 STST vs 1018 CRS). Direct material-swap pair — perfect calibration anchor for STST/CRS cost delta on identical geometry.

Chain rail accumulator side mag end, 1-3/8 x 2 CF STST bar x 110-3/4 long. 5 hole types: A=17/64 thru 10x, B=Ø.218 thru 10x, C=13/64 thru 2x, D=1/4-20 UNC tapped 3x, E=10-32 tapped 4x = 22 thru + 7 tapped total. Drilled rail along 110.75 length. Drawn JMH 04/03/1998 (OLDEST part in library now — predates JOB02343 by 8 yrs). LONGEST drilled bar stock in library at 110.75in. Job 1820.

parts.material_family: CRS Plate (material not explicit on print; PLATE header)
parts.notes: Leg hold-down pad, 0.1875 thk plate 2 x 3.906 (3-29/32). Holes: A=Ø0.50 thru (1), B=Ø0.8125 thru (1). 3/16 R (2) corner radii + 45° (2) chamfered corners. Drawn 2/9/00. CRS-side of material-swap pair with M-207-1S (304 STST sister, same date and geometry). Simple flat plate with 2 thru holes and partial chamfer profile. PART NUMBER NOTE: prefix M- denotes Magazine series legacy Schneider parts.

Leg hold-down pad, 0.1875 thk 304 STST 2 x 3.906. Holes: A=Ø0.50 thru (1), B=Ø0.8125 thru (1). 3/16 R (2) + 45° (2) chamfered corners. Drawn 2/9/00. CALIBRATION PAIR with M-207-1 (CRS sister, identical geometry, same date) — 2nd direct STST/CRS material-swap pair in library (after ENDCAP2X3CRS/SS). Twin pair to compute STST premium on 0.1875 thk plate at 7.81 sqin.

Magazine top case hold arm, 1018 CRS 0.25 thk x 1.50 x 7.50 plate. Holes: A=Ø7/16 thru (2), B=3/8-16 UNC tapped (1). 1/8 R (2) corner radii. Multi-hole at 0.375 / 0.750 / 1.125 spacing (3 features along length). Drawn 4/4/02. Magazine series. Longer narrow arm (5:1 aspect).

Magazine top case hold NYL, NYLON cylindrical/round part, PART TO LENGTH IN LATHE. Single tapped hole A=3/8-16 (1). Lathe-turned plastic part. Drawn 7/18/94 — OLD legacy part (2nd oldest in library after JOB01820-H29003 @ 1998... actually older than that by 4 yrs — NEW oldest record at 1994). FIRST PLASTIC / NYLON part in library — opens new material family vs all-metal prior entries. Likely simple lathe turn from nylon rod stock with 3/8-16 tap.

Reflector mount angle bracket, 11 GA STST (~0.12 thk) formed angle. Holes: A=Ø17/64 thru (2), B=Ø25/64 thru (1). R1/4 (4X) corners. Bent angle bracket (formed). Magazine 307B series. Companion to M-307B-2S/8 reflector mount weldments — pre-bend version (no welded stud).

parts.finish: TIG welded (no porosity / cold lap / undercut)
parts.notes: Reflector mount weldment, 304 STST. BOM: 1x 1/8 x 1.50 x 2.25 plate + 1x 3/8-16 ALL THREAD x 3.50 stud, TIG welded. A=Ø13/64 thru (1) on plate. R.13 4X corner radii on plate. Approved PS 1/2/91. Rev B 05/06/2021 added radii to corners (JJL). Rev C 07/05/2023 added TIG WELD NOTE (JJL). LEGACY 1991 part — now 3rd oldest in library. Pair to M-307B-8 (larger reflector mount weldment, 1/2-13 stud variant). NOTE: TIG WELD REQUIRED.

parts.finish: TIG welded (no porosity / cold lap / undercut)
parts.notes: Reflector mount weldment (large variant), STST. BOM: 1x 1/8 x 3 x 4.75 plate + 1x 1/2-13 stud x 4.75 long, TIG welded. A=Ø13/64 thru (1). R.13 4X corner radii. Drawn RWB 5/14/04. Rev A 04/11/2018 CHANGED MAT'L CRS→STST (SRW). Rev B 05/16/2019 added weld symbol. Rev C 05/06/2021 added corner radii. Rev D 07/05/2023 added TIG weld note. CALIBRATION PAIR with M-307B-2S — same design family, scaled up 4x in plate area (3.375→14.25 sqin) + larger stud (3/8→1/2). MIGRATION HISTORY: started CRS, switched to STST in 2018 — useful audit trail for material substitution costs.

parts.description: TOP FRAME, ACCU SIDE BELT EDGE ASSY
parts.notes: Top frame accumulator side belt edge assembly weldment. BOM: 1x NPCT (2666-2701) V12005 R2 + 1x NPCT (2666-2701) V12054 R1. Envelope 54.50 / 56.49 / 60.50 (large frame ~5 ft span). Weld + No-Weld zones called out — partial weld. NOTE: GRIND INSIDE SMOOTH (post-weld finishing op). Drawn JPF 10/15/2010. NPCT (2666-2701) job series — accumulator/belt edge assembly. LARGE STRUCTURAL weldment ~60 in span.

TCP backwall panel, 0.19 thk ALUMINUM sheet 16.00 x 15.125. Holes: A=Ø.203 thru with Ø.385 x 82° c'sink (3x). R.38 4X corner radii. Drawn 2/4/2010. **FIRST ALUMINUM sheet metal part in library** — opens new material family. C'sink for flat-head fasteners on backwall mount. Mid-size panel ~242 sqin. PART NUMBER NOTE: NPPP prefix denotes NPPP machine line (Schneider).

parts.dims: 0.12 thk STST, 8.89 x 6.91 envelope, formed w/ bends
parts.notes: Load gate continuous taper, 0.12 thk STST sheet formed w/ at least 1 bend (25° + 90° per OCR). Holes: A=Ø13/64 thru w/ 1/8 c'sink (1), Ø.203 (2x), Ø.375 (2x) = 4 thru total + 1 c'sink. Tapered profile 1.156 / 1.862 / 3.088 / 3.87 at varying X positions. Drawn Rev B 04/03/2012 SMH (added view to show bend angles). NPPP machine series. Bent tapered load gate. NOTE on print: REV B added bend angle view — indicates angles are critical features.
